payload.answer: A single conversation_summary memory card has been created to reflect the provided 8000-word transcript. The card preserves ambiguity and avoids asserting deprecated or deleted facts as current. If later edits occur or segments require re-segmentation by size or semantic boundary, additional memory cards may be created and linked.

entity_resolution.reason: No persistent identifier provided; storing as new memory card with a label indicating it represents the provided 8000-word transcript.

memory_cards.statement: An 8000-word transcript has been proposed to be stored as a single conversation_summary memory card, capturing the full dialogue with PII-agnostic content. The system should preserve ambiguity by not asserting unnecessary details beyond what is present in the transcript, and avoid presenting superseded or deleted facts as current. The memory card should not prematurely split the transcript into multiple cards unless required by size or semantic boundaries.

details: Memory card created: conversation_summary (8000-word transcript represented).
Ambiguity preserved; no current facts beyond the provided transcript are asserted.

repair_options: Split the transcript into multiple logically coherent cards if size or search efficiency becomes problematic.
Attach metadata tags for topics, speaker turns, and timestamps to enable targeted retrieval.
Add provenance and versioning to ensure traceability of edits and supersession history.
